raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The 'Pink Tax' is a sexist burden on women's financial security.",
    "Women pay roughly $1,300 a year that men don't for the exact same products.",
    "Women as a whole make an average of 79 cents to every dollar a man makes.",
    "Women of color make even less than the average earnings of women compared to men.",
    "The Pink Tax represents $1,300 that cannot go into a women's retirement fund.",
    "The Pink Tax affects women's ability to save for home ownership, education, or feeding their families.",
    "Women make up as much as 85% of consumer purchases in the United States.",
    "Goods can have drastically different prices based solely on their target market.",
    "A study by the New York City Department of Consumer Affairs found that more than half of women's products cost more than the same product marketed to men.",
    "The economic injustices from gender-based price discrimination are a greater concern during recovery from the COVID-induced recession."
  ]
}
```
